hooks.command: STATUS=$(cat /Users/lapoldeonwilliams/spur-ai-app/.claude/last_status.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'Claude stopped. Check conversation for latest update.'); curl -s -X POST https://ntfy.sh/spur-ai-founder-os -d "$STATUS" -H 'Title: Spur AI — Claude Stopped (check conversation)' -H 'Priority: default' -H 'Tags: brain,stopwatch' 2>/dev/null || true

curl -s -X POST https://ntfy.sh/spur-ai-founder-os -d 'Claude Code session started. Building Spur AI MVP.' -H 'Title: Spur AI — Session Started' -H 'Priority: low' -H 'Tags: green_circle' 2>/dev/null || true
